name: Cucumber Party Ryes
recipeIngredient: 1 package Good Seasons Italian Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cream cheese and dressing mix together until well combined.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on a slice of rye bread.
3. Place a slice of cucumber on top of the cream cheese mixture.
4. Sprinkle dill weed over the cucumber slice.
